Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to supply fresh content for the email.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching specified keywords, pulling channel data, subscriber counts, and recent video performance.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves stored creator profiles, outreach sequences, and prompt templates to inform personalized messaging.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates product launch email copy and monthly recap email content using new product data and brand messaging guidelines.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth data, and email performance stats for the reporting period.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully drafted B2B SEO blog posts targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — using keyword-optimized prompts and industry context.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each backorder line with the live Dream inventory data, appending current status columns and flagging parts with no sourcing path as dead-ends.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a dynamic, decision-ready report that clearly shows which parts have a resolution path and which are true dead-ends requiring escalation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backordered parts, pre-populated with part status, expected resolution, and escalation notes for dead-end items.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates the manual drafting burden across multiple team members, ensuring customers receive timely, consistent updates with accurate status information.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to extract make, model, year, and part fitment data for all two-piece rotor offerings.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitor fitment reference in minutes rather than the days it would take to manually catalog three separate vendor sites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify coverage overlaps and gaps in DFC's current lineup.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a clear, data-driven view of where DFC competes and where it's missing coverage, directly informing sourcing and product development priorities.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about demand for specific two-piece rotor fitments where DFC has identified coverage gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signals from the customer base to validate which gaps are worth filling, replacing manual sales outreach with a scalable automated touchpoint.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, DFC cross-reference results, and incoming customer demand responses into one formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a single, always-current source of truth for two-piece rotor market coverage, eliminating the need to manually consolidate data from multiple sources.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields — headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — pulling the full text of every live ad into the workflow.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant, complete visibility across the entire active ad library without anyone manually opening and reading individual ads in multiple ad managers.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all pulled ad copy for specified target phrases or patterns and produces a flagged list identifying the exact ad, field, and matching text for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Surfaces every instance of a flagged phrase across hundreds of ads in seconds, replacing what would be a tedious manual line-by-line review.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a structured report listing every flagged ad with the platform, campaign, ad ID, field name, and the exact copy where each phrase match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, immediately actionable compliance or QA report to the right person on demand, with no manual investigation required.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details, and routes them into the workflow.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures every application is captured and processed immediately, eliminating the risk of candidates falling through the cracks in a shared inbox.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF into an organized Drive folder structure, filed by role and applicant name for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, searchable applicant file library without anyone manually downloading and organizing attachments from email.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume and scores the candidate against the requirements of open roles, producing a hiring recommendation of approve, deny, or pause based on current role status.
Resume Bot.impact: Delivers a consistent, bias-reduced first-pass screening decision for every applicant in seconds, freeing recruiters to focus only on qualified candidates.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant, their score, Claude's decision, and a Drive link to their resume into the hiring dashboard, with paused candidates routed to a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a real-time, centralized dashboard of all applicants and decisions, replacing scattered inbox threads with one organized source of truth.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is running strong with 56 total agents across the portfolio — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While this week was a steady-state week with no new movements, over half the pipeline is now fully live and delivering value daily across email marketing, customer support, paid media, creator outreach, and more. The team has built incredible momentum, and with 18 planned agents still in the queue, there's plenty of exciting work on the horizon!
